name: AfroFuel official-source refresh workflow
price_update_policy: Do not update a public fuel price from a changed page hash alone.
Only write petrol, diesel, LPG, or kerosene prices when the source gives a current, human-readable absolute pump price, product, geography, currency, unit, and effective period.
If a source gives only price adjustments, notices, policy context, or expired tables, update source state only and leave prices unchanged.
Rows are not official regulator prices unless official_verified is true and the row includes the exact official source URL used for the price.

pipeline.rule: Fetch the official regulator or government source URL from the ledger before third-party sources.
Parse only tables, PDFs, or downloads whose period is visible and current. Keep raw evidence outside public source files.
Validate country, product, currency, unit, geography, and effective period before changing a price.
Update only verified rows. Preserve existing stale rows and label the source_state when verification fails.
Run source ledger checks, route/browser smoke, console checks, and a no-invented-price fixture check.

priority_countries.authority: Department of Mineral and Petroleum Resources
priority_countries.latest_observed_period: Fuel prices effective from 03 June 2026 listed on the official index.
priority_countries.price_action: No price update until the current fuel price schedule is parsed as absolute pump prices.

priority_countries.latest_observed_period: Visible table showed 15-12-2025 to 14-01-2026 during review.
priority_countries.price_action: No price update because the visible official table was expired for the review date.

priority_countries.latest_observed_period: Official page exposes price build-up year folders; parser and current-period file selection are required.
priority_countries.price_action: No price update until the current official file is selected and parsed.

priority_countries.authority: Nigerian Midstream and Downstream Petroleum Regulatory Authority
priority_countries.latest_observed_period: Regulator site available; no current public pump-price table was verified in this pass.
